focus: Integrate stable project traceability and versioning across mission, article, search evolution, architecture version, decision ledger, git tag, and endpoint artifacts.
reason_started: The operator provided mission updates requiring permanent identifiers and cross-reference paths across artifacts, endpoints, architecture versions, and experiments.
reason_ended: The mission standard, traceability registry, timeline docs, canonical decision record, endpoint manifest, local /api/v0.1 aliases, traceability payloads, and validator are implemented and locally validated.

deployment.reason: Mission update was implemented locally; explicit deployment approval is required before public /api/v0.1 routes change.

validators_executed.name: npm run validate
validators_executed.evidence: 21 tests passed; MDE parsed; traceability validator passed; fixture index and evaluation checks passed.

validators_skipped.name: Cloudflare deploy verification
validators_skipped.reason: No explicit deploy request was made for GEN-010.

validators_skipped.name: git tag v0.1.0 verification
validators_skipped.reason: The current working tree needs a commit before tagging.

github_submission.blocker: The operator provided mission updates, not a commit or push request.

reusable_lessons: Traceability should be validated as a first-class contract before a project adds multiple experiments and architecture versions.
downstream_impacts: Phase 2 BEIR work should start by assigning M/SE/ARCH/ADL/tag identifiers before implementation.
content_seeds: Article 2 can now cite the formal chain M-0001 -> A-0002 -> SE-0001 -> ARCH-0.1 -> ADL-0001 -> v0.1.0.
evidence_quality_notes: The traceability standard is now present in mission, docs, registry, local API response contracts, and validation.
Public deployment and git tag are intentionally marked pending.

supports_mission: Makes the project navigable as a search engineering knowledge base.
Creates stable identifiers before Phase 2 adds more experiments.
Preserves existing legacy ADL-001 references while adding canonical ADL-0001.
goal_drift_review.mission_alignment: GEN-010 strengthens the evidence and navigation requirements without adding unearned search architecture.
